backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Room, Stroke, and AudioMessage types with functions to create/join rooms, add/get strokes, and add/get audio messages, all stored in an in-memory map.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old pairing-code-based actor state into the new room-based actor state, initializing an empty rooms map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (collaborative drawing, voice messaging, room UI, routing) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with SEO, Open Graph, and PWA meta tags that mounts the React app via the /src/main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root TanStack Router setup defining two routes: the home lobby at '/' and the room page at '/room/$code', wrapped in a shared Layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CollaborativeCan: Multiplayer canvas component that polls remote strokes at intervals and renders them incrementally, while capturing and submitting local freehand strokes as normalized coordinates to the backend.
frontend/src/components/DrawingCanvas.ts: Standalone freehand drawing canvas with mouse/touch support, color swatches, and stroke size controls; exposes getDataURL() and isEmpty() via a forwarded ref handle.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines a full-page layout wrapper with a main content area and a footer that displays a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link and copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePane: Renders a voice message panel that allows users to record and send audio messages in a room, and displays a scrollable list of received voice messages with playback controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioRecorder.ts: Custom hook that manages browser microphone recording via the MediaRecorder API, returning start/stop functions and converting recorded audio to a base64 data URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions, including legacy pairing-code methods and room-based hooks for creating rooms, joining, managing strokes, and sending/polling voice messages.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines a pastel-themed design system with custom OKLCH color tokens for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page that lets users choose to create or join a drawing room, handling room creation via API and navigation to the room route.
frontend/src/pages/Recipient.tsx: Empty file with no content, likely a legacy placeholder from the old sender/recipient flow.
frontend/src/pages/Room.tsx: Room page that handles username entry/join flow, then renders the collaborative canvas and voice message panel with a copyable room code header.
frontend/src/pages/Sender.tsx: Empty file with no content, likely a legacy placeholder from the old sender/recipient flow.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom pastel color tokens, OKLCH-based semantic colors, extended border radii, box shadows, fonts, and animation keyframes for the app's design system.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking implemented features, architectural notes, and pending feature requests for the collaborative drawing and voice messaging app.
